framework.name: Datatilsynet GDPR Technical Measures Guidance
framework.name_nl: Datatilsynets vejledning om tekniske og organisatoriske foranstaltninger
framework.scope: Technical and organizational measures for personal data protection under GDPR, as recommended by the Danish Data Protection Authority
framework.structure_description: Measures organized by security domain: access control, encryption, logging, vulnerability management, backup, deletion, network security, physical security, data breach handling, supplier management, data subject rights, and privacy by design.

controls.title: Role-based access control
controls.description: Access to personal data must be granted based on the user role and strictly following the need-to-know principle.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til personoplysninger skal tildeles baseret pa brugerens rolle og strengt efter need-to-know princippet.

controls.title: Multi-factor authentication for sensitive data
controls.description: Access to systems with sensitive personal data must require multi-factor authentication.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til systemer med folsomme personoplysninger skal kraeeve flerfaktorautentifikation.

controls.title: Regular review of access rights
controls.description: Access rights to personal data must be reviewed regularly and revoked when no longer necessary.
controls.description_nl: Adgangsrettigheder til personoplysninger skal gennemgas regelmaeessigt og tilbagekaldes nar de ikke laengere er nodvendige.

controls.title: Logging of access to personal data
controls.description: Access to personal data must be logged indicating who, what, when, and why.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til personoplysninger skal logges med angivelse af hvem, hvad, hvornor og hvorfor.

controls.title: Encryption of data in transit
controls.description: Personal data transferred electronically must be encrypted with TLS 1.2 or stronger.
controls.description_nl: Personoplysninger der overfoeres elektronisk skal krypteres med TLS 1.2 eller staerkere.

controls.title: Encryption of data at rest
controls.description: Sensitive personal data stored electronically must be encrypted at disk or database level.
controls.description_nl: Folsomme personoplysninger der opbevares elektronisk skal krypteres pa disk- eller databaseniveau.

controls.title: Encryption of mobile devices
controls.description: Mobile devices that may contain personal data must have full-disk encryption enabled.
controls.description_nl: Mobile enheder der kan indeholde personoplysninger skal have fulddiskkryptering aktiveret.

controls.title: Encryption of email with personal data
controls.description: Emails containing sensitive personal data must be encrypted end-to-end or sent via secure portal.
controls.description_nl: E-mails der indeholder folsomme personoplysninger skal krypteres end-to-end eller sendes via sikker portal.

controls.title: Logging of processing activities
controls.description: All processing of personal data must be logged, particularly creation, modification, search, and deletion.
controls.description_nl: Alle behandlinger af personoplysninger skal logges, saerligt oprettelse, aendring, soegning og sletning.

controls.title: Protection of log data
controls.description: Log data about processing of personal data must be protected against tampering and unauthorized access.
controls.description_nl: Logdata om behandling af personoplysninger skal beskyttes mod manipulation og uautoriseret adgang.

controls.title: Retention of log data
controls.description: Log data must be retained for sufficient time to support supervision and investigation, but not longer than necessary.
controls.description_nl: Logdata skal opbevares i tilstraekkelig tid til at understotte tilsyn og efterforskning, men ikke laengere end nodvendigt.

controls.title: Vulnerability scanning
controls.description: Systems processing personal data must be scanned regularly for technical vulnerabilities.
controls.description_nl: Systemer der behandler personoplysninger skal scannes regelmaeessigt for tekniske sarbarheder.

controls.title: Patch management
controls.description: Security updates for systems with personal data must be installed within defined deadlines.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedsopdateringer for systemer med personoplysninger skal installeres inden for definerede tidsfrister.

controls.title: Security testing for new systems
controls.description: New systems that will process personal data must undergo security testing before deployment.
controls.description_nl: Nye systemer der skal behandle personoplysninger skal gennemga sikkerhedstest for idriftsaettelse.

controls.title: Backup of personal data
controls.description: Regular backups of personal data must be taken with testing of recovery procedures.
controls.description_nl: Der skal taees regelmaeessig backup af personoplysninger med test af gendannelsesprocedurer.

controls.title: Encryption of backup media
controls.description: Backup media containing personal data must be encrypted.
controls.description_nl: Backup-medier der indeholder personoplysninger skal krypteres.

controls.title: Secure deletion of personal data
controls.description: Personal data must be securely deleted when the retention period expires so it cannot be recovered.
controls.description_nl: Personoplysninger skal slettes sikkert nar opbevaringsperioden udlober, sa de ikke kan gendannes.

controls.title: Deletion at equipment disposal
controls.description: When disposing of or reusing equipment, all personal data must be securely deleted.
controls.description_nl: Ved bortskaffelse eller genbrug af udstyr skal alle personoplysninger slettes sikkert.

controls.title: Network segmentation
controls.description: Systems processing personal data must be segmented from the rest of the network.
controls.description_nl: Systemer der behandler personoplysninger skal vaere segmenteret fra det oeevrige netvaerk.

controls.title: Protection against unauthorized access
controls.description: Network traffic to systems with personal data must be monitored and filtered.
controls.description_nl: Netvaerkstrafik til systemer med personoplysninger skal overrages og filtreres.

controls.title: Physical access control to server rooms
controls.description: Server rooms and data centers storing personal data must have physical access control and logging.
controls.description_nl: Serverrum og datacentre der opbevarer personoplysninger skal have fysisk adgangskontrol og logning.

controls.title: Procedures for handling data breaches
controls.description: The organization must have clear procedures for identifying, assessing, and reporting breaches of personal data security.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have klare procedurer for identificering, vurdering og anmeldelse af brud pa persondatasikkerheden.
controls.implementation_guidance: Databrud skal anmeldes til Datatilsynet inden 72 timer. Alvorlige brud skal ogsa meddeles de registrerede.

controls.title: Documentation of data breaches
controls.description: All data breaches must be documented, regardless of whether they are reported to the DPA.
controls.description_nl: Alle databrud skal dokumenteres, uanset om de anmeldes til Datatilsynet eller ej.

controls.title: Data processor agreements
controls.description: The organization must enter into data processor agreements with all suppliers processing personal data on its behalf.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal indga databehandleraftaler med alle leverandoerer der behandler personoplysninger pa dens vegne.

controls.title: Audit of data processors
controls.description: The organization must regularly audit or obtain audit reports from its data processors.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal regelmaeessigt auditere eller indhente auditrapporter fra sine databehandlere.

controls.title: Data portability
controls.description: The organization must be able to provide personal data in a structured, machine-readable format.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal vaere i stand til at udlevere personoplysninger i et struktureret, maskinlaesbart format.

controls.title: Right of access
controls.description: The organization must have a procedure for responding to access requests within 30 days.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en procedure for at besvare indsigtsanmodninger inden for 30 dage.

controls.title: Right to erasure
controls.description: The organization must have a procedure for handling requests for erasure of personal data.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en procedure for at haandtere anmodninger om sletning af personoplysninger.

controls.title: Data protection by design
controls.description: New systems and processes must be designed with data protection built in from the start.
controls.description_nl: Nye systemer og processer skal designes med databeskyttelse indbygget fra starten.

controls.title: Default data protection settings
controls.description: Default settings must ensure the highest level of data protection (privacy by default).
controls.description_nl: Standardindstillinger skal sikre det hoejeste niveau af databeskyttelse (privacy by default).

metadata.source: Datatilsynet GDPR guidance (compiled from published guidance)
